workflowInfo.workflowDescription: z/OS health snapshot: spool, CPU, paging, dataset I/O; renders HTML report on-host.

variable.name: WORKDIR
variable.label: USS Work Directory
variable.abstract: USS directory the collectors write VERDICT files to and the report step reads
variable.description: Must already exist and be writable by the workflow owner. Each collector writes one hc_<axis>.txt file here; the final step concatenates them and writes zos_health_report.html here. generate_report.py must also be present in this directory (upload it once).

variable.name: PYTHON3
variable.label: Python 3 Interpreter Path
variable.abstract: Full USS path to the IBM Open Enterprise SDK for Python interpreter
variable.description: Used by the final report step. Must be an executable python3 (3.7+). Default is the IBM Open Enterprise SDK for Python 3.13 location verified on this system.

variable.name: SPOOL_HIGH_WATER
variable.label: Spool High Water Threshold (%)
variable.abstract: Overall spool % at or above which the spool axis is RED
variable.description: Numeric percentage 1-99. The spool step emits VERDICT:SPOOL:<pct>:<threshold>:RED when this is breached, AMBER when within 10 points below it, GREEN otherwise.

variable.name: TOP_N
variable.label: Top Consumer Count
variable.abstract: How many largest consumers to list in the spool and dataset steps

variable.name: CPU_RATIO_RED
variable.label: CPU Ratio RED Threshold (%)
variable.abstract: CPU/elapsed % below which a long-running STC is graded RED
variable.description: A started task running longer than MIN_ELAPSED_HOURS with a CPU/elapsed ratio below this value is likely holding an MLC software charge for near-zero productive work.

variable.name: CPU_RATIO_AMBER
variable.label: CPU Ratio AMBER Threshold (%)
variable.abstract: CPU/elapsed % below which a long-running STC is graded AMBER

variable.name: MIN_ELAPSED_HOURS
variable.label: Minimum STC Elapsed Hours
variable.abstract: An STC must have run at least this long before its CPU ratio is graded
variable.description: Prevents short-lived jobs from triggering false CPU-ratio alerts during start-up phases.

variable.name: PGRATE_RED
variable.label: Paging Rate RED Threshold (page-ins/sec)
variable.abstract: Sustained paging rate above which memory is graded RED
variable.description: Compared against the DEMAND PAGING column of the RMF Postprocessor Summary report. Values above 100/s typically indicate real-storage shortfall on a lightly-loaded system.

variable.name: PGRATE_AMBER
variable.label: Paging Rate AMBER Threshold (page-ins/sec)
variable.abstract: Sustained paging rate above which memory is graded AMBER

variable.name: SMF_INPUT_DSN
variable.label: SMF Archive Dataset
variable.abstract: Dataset name of the SMF archive to read for the CPU, memory and dataset steps
variable.description: Typically SYS1.MAN1, SYS1.MAN2, or a customer MANX/MANY offload dataset. Must be readable by the TSO user running the workflow. Used by steps 2 (SMF-30), 3 (RMF Postprocessor) and 4 (SMF-14/15). Prefer a recently offloaded (inactive) dataset: dumping the live recording dataset works but can produce in-flight-record warnings.

variable.name: MEASUREMENT_HOURS
variable.label: Measurement Window (hours)
variable.abstract: How many hours of SMF records to analyse, counting back from now
variable.description: Whole number 1-168. 24 covers one full business day. 48 or 168 gives a more stable CPU-ratio picture across varying workload shapes. Enforced two ways: IFASMFDP DATE() day-level filtering at dump time, then record-level timestamp filtering in the analysis REXX.

step.name: spoolPressure
step.title: Spool Pressure Snapshot
step.description: Reads SDSF SP for per-volume utilisation and SDSF ST for the top-N job and owner consumers. Writes VERDICT and TOP_CONSUMER lines to WORKDIR/hc_spool.txt for the on-host report step.
step.instructions:
This step measures how full the spool is and who is holding it.
It reads the SDSF SP panel for every spool volume, totals track groups used vs available, and compares the result to the ${instance-SPOOL_HIGH_WATER}% threshold. It then reads the SDSF ST panel and lists the ${instance-TOP_N} largest jobs and owners.
The VERDICT and TOP_CONSUMER lines are echoed to the job log AND written to ${instance-WORKDIR}/hc_spool.txt, which the final report step reads. If that file cannot be written the step still completes (the report step will simply omit this axis).

template.inlineTemplate:
/* REXX - Spool pressure: SP panel utilisation + ST panel consumers. */ /* VERDICT/TOP_CONSUMER lines are captured via EMIT and written to */ /* WORKDIR/hc_spool.txt by WRITEOUT for the on-host report step. */ SIGNAL ON NOVALUE NAME HANDLE_ERROR
WORKDIR = '${instance-WORKDIR}' HIGHWM = '${instance-SPOOL_HIGH_WATER}' TOPN = '${instance-TOP_N}' OUT. = ''; OUT.0 = 0
IF DATATYPE(HIGHWM,'N') = 0 THEN DO SAY 'SPOOL_HIGH_WATER is not numeric:' HIGHWM; EXIT 12 END IF DATATYPE(TOPN,'W') = 0 THEN DO SAY 'TOP_N is not a whole number:' TOPN; EXIT 12 END IF TOPN < 1 THEN DO SAY 'TOP_N is not a positive integer:' TOPN; EXIT 12 END
X = ISFCALLS('ON') IF X <> 0 THEN DO; SAY 'ISFCALLS ON failed RC=' X; EXIT 12; END
DEVNAME. = ''; STATUS. = ''; TGNUM. = 0; TGUSE. = 0; TGPCT. = 0
ADDRESS SDSF "ISFEXEC SP" IF RC <> 0 THEN DO; SAY 'ISFEXEC SP failed RC=' RC; CALL BAIL 12; END
IF WORDPOS('TGUSE',ISFCOLS) = 0 THEN DO SAY 'ERROR: TGUSE missing from SDSF SP column set (' WORDS(ISFCOLS) 'cols).' SAY 'Another SDSF panel was already used in this TSO address space.' CALL BAIL 8 END
SAY COPIES('=',72) SAY 'SPOOL UTILISATION -' DATE('S') TIME() SAY COPIES('=',72) SAY LEFT('VOLUME',9) LEFT('STATUS',9) RIGHT('TG TOTAL',9) , RIGHT('TG USED',9) RIGHT('PCT',7) SAY COPIES('-',72)
TOTTG = 0; USETG = 0 DO I = 1 TO DEVNAME.0 TOTTG = TOTTG + TGNUM.I USETG = USETG + TGUSE.I SAY LEFT(DEVNAME.I,9) LEFT(STATUS.I,9) RIGHT(TGNUM.I,9) , RIGHT(TGUSE.I,9) RIGHT(TGPCT.I,6)'%' END
IF TOTTG = 0 THEN DO SAY 'No spool volumes reported track groups.'; CALL BAIL 8 END
PCT = FORMAT(USETG * 100 / TOTTG,,2) AMBER = HIGHWM - 10 SELECT WHEN PCT >= HIGHWM THEN GRADE = 'RED' WHEN PCT >= AMBER THEN GRADE = 'AMBER' OTHERWISE GRADE = 'GREEN' END SAY COPIES('-',72) SAY 'Volumes:' DEVNAME.0 ' TG used:' USETG 'of' TOTTG SAY 'OVERALL SPOOL:' PCT'% Threshold:' HIGHWM'% Grade:' GRADE SAY COPIES('=',72) CALL EMIT 'VERDICT:SPOOL:'PCT':'HIGHWM':'GRADE
JNAME. = ''; JOBID. = ''; OWNERID. = ''; QUEUE. = ''; TGNUM. = 0 ISFOWNER = '*' ISFSORT = 'TGNUM D'
ADDRESS SDSF "ISFEXEC ST" IF RC <> 0 THEN DO; SAY 'ISFEXEC ST failed RC=' RC; CALL BAIL 12; END
HAS_OWNER = (WORDPOS('OWNERID',ISFCOLS) > 0) HAS_JOBID = (WORDPOS('JOBID', ISFCOLS) > 0) HAS_QUEUE = (WORDPOS('QUEUE', ISFCOLS) > 0) IF \HAS_OWNER THEN SAY 'NOTE: OWNERID not in ST column set.'
N = JNAME.0 SAY ' ' SAY 'TOP' TOPN 'JOBS BY SPOOL USAGE (total jobs on spool:' N')' SAY COPIES('-',72) SAY LEFT('JOBNAME',9) LEFT('JOBID',9) LEFT('OWNER',9) LEFT('QUEUE',10) , RIGHT('TRK GRP',8) RIGHT('SPOOL%',7) SAY COPIES('-',72)
JOBTG = 0 DO I = 1 TO N; JOBTG = JOBTG + TGNUM.I; END
DO K = 1 TO MIN(TOPN, N) IF TGNUM.K = 0 THEN LEAVE OWN = '(n/a)'; IF HAS_OWNER THEN OWN = OWNERID.K IF OWN = '' THEN OWN = '(none)' JID = '(n/a)'; IF HAS_JOBID THEN JID = JOBID.K IF JID = '' THEN JID = '(none)' SHARE = 0 IF JOBTG > 0 THEN SHARE = FORMAT(TGNUM.K * 100 / JOBTG,,1) SAY LEFT(JNAME.K,9) LEFT(JID,9) LEFT(OWN,9) , LEFT(QUEUE.K,10) RIGHT(TGNUM.K,8) RIGHT(SHARE,6)'%' CALL EMIT 'TOP_CONSUMER:SPOOL:'JNAME.K':'OWN':'SHARE'%' END
CALL WRITEOUT 'spool' SAY COPIES('=',72) SAY 'SPOOL PRESSURE COMPLETE' CALL BAIL 0
BAIL: X = ISFCALLS('OFF') EXIT ARG(1)
EMIT: L = ARG(1); SAY L K2 = OUT.0 + 1; OUT.K2 = L; OUT.0 = K2 RETURN
WRITEOUT: FN = WORKDIR'/hc_'ARG(1)'.txt' ADDRESS TSO "ALLOC FI(HCOUT) PATH('"FN"')" , "PATHOPTS(OWRONLY,OCREAT,OTRUNC) PATHMODE(SIRWXU) FILEDATA(TEXT)" IF RC = 0 THEN DO ADDRESS TSO "EXECIO" OUT.0 "DISKW HCOUT (STEM OUT. FINIS" IF RC <> 0 THEN SAY 'WARN: EXECIO to' FN 'RC='RC ADDRESS TSO "FREE FI(HCOUT)" END ELSE SAY 'WARN: could not open' FN 'RC='RC RETURN
HANDLE_ERROR: SAY 'REXX NOVALUE at line' SIGL 'variable:' CONDITION('D') EXIT 12

step.name: cpuShapeAnalysis
step.title: CPU Shape Analysis (SMF-30)
step.description: Dumps SMF type-30 records with IFASMFDP (called from REXX), parses subtype-5 records using the offsets pinned by artifact 12, grades STC CPU/elapsed ratios, and writes VERDICT/TOP_CONSUMER lines to WORKDIR/hc_cpu.txt.
step.instructions:
This step reads SMF type-30 subtype-5 (termination) records from ${instance-SMF_INPUT_DSN} for the last ${instance-MEASUREMENT_HOURS} hours, grades each started task's CPU/elapsed ratio against the RED/AMBER thresholds, and writes the result to ${instance-WORKDIR}/hc_cpu.txt.
Known limitation: subtype-5 records are written at termination, so an idle STC that never stops does not appear until it is recycled. Look for VERDICT:CPU: in the job log.

template.inlineTemplate:
/* REXX - CPU shape from SMF type-30 subtype-5 records. */ /* IFASMFDP is called from this exec (control cards to a temp SYSIN) */ /* because in-stream DD data hangs z/OSMF JCL submission. Offsets are */ /* artifact-12 values minus 4 (EXECIO strips the RDW) plus 1 for */ /* 1-based SUBSTR. VERDICT/TOP_CONSUMER captured via EMIT, written to */ /* WORKDIR/hc_cpu.txt by WRITEOUT for the on-host report step. */ SIGNAL ON NOVALUE NAME HANDLE_ERROR
WORKDIR = '${instance-WORKDIR}' SMF_DSN = '${instance-SMF_INPUT_DSN}' WIN_HRS = '${instance-MEASUREMENT_HOURS}' RED_THR = '${instance-CPU_RATIO_RED}' AMB_THR = '${instance-CPU_RATIO_AMBER}' MIN_HRS = '${instance-MIN_ELAPSED_HOURS}' OUT. = ''; OUT.0 = 0
IF DATATYPE(WIN_HRS,'W') = 0 THEN DO SAY 'MEASUREMENT_HOURS must be a whole number:' WIN_HRS; EXIT 12 END IF WIN_HRS < 1 THEN DO SAY 'MEASUREMENT_HOURS must be at least 1:' WIN_HRS; EXIT 12 END IF DATATYPE(RED_THR,'N') = 0 THEN DO SAY 'CPU_RATIO_RED must be numeric:' RED_THR; EXIT 12 END IF DATATYPE(AMB_THR,'N') = 0 THEN DO SAY 'CPU_RATIO_AMBER must be numeric:' AMB_THR; EXIT 12 END IF AMB_THR <= RED_THR THEN DO SAY 'CPU_RATIO_AMBER must be greater than CPU_RATIO_RED.'; EXIT 12 END IF DATATYPE(MIN_HRS,'N') = 0 THEN DO SAY 'MIN_ELAPSED_HOURS must be numeric:' MIN_HRS; EXIT 12 END
SAY COPIES('=',72) SAY 'CPU SHAPE ANALYSIS (SMF-30 SUBTYPE 5) -' DATE('S') TIME() SAY 'Dataset:' SMF_DSN ' Window:' WIN_HRS 'hours' SAY COPIES('=',72)
NOWABS = DATE('B') * 86400 + TIME('S') CUTOFF = NOWABS - WIN_HRS * 3600 STARTJ = BASE2J(DATE('B') - (WIN_HRS % 24 + 1)) ENDJ = BASE2J(DATE('B'))
ADDRESS TSO "ALLOC FI(SYSIN) NEW DELETE REUSE UNIT(SYSDA) SPACE(1,1) TRACKS" , "RECFM(F B) LRECL(80) BLKSIZE(3120)" IF RC <> 0 THEN DO; SAY 'ALLOC SYSIN failed RC=' RC; EXIT 12; END QUEUE ' INDD(DUMPIN,OPTIONS(DUMP))' QUEUE ' OUTDD(DUMPOUT,TYPE(30))' QUEUE ' DATE('STARTJ','ENDJ')' "EXECIO" QUEUED() "DISKW SYSIN (FINIS" IF RC <> 0 THEN DO SAY 'Write of IFASMFDP control cards failed RC=' RC CALL CLEANUP; EXIT 12 END
"ALLOC FI(DUMPIN) DA('"SMF_DSN"') SHR REUSE" IF RC <> 0 THEN DO SAY 'ALLOC of' SMF_DSN 'failed RC=' RC CALL CLEANUP; EXIT 12 END "ALLOC FI(DUMPOUT) NEW DELETE REUSE UNIT(SYSDA)" , "SPACE(50,50) CYLINDERS" , "RECFM(V B S) LRECL(32760) BLKSIZE(27998)" IF RC <> 0 THEN DO SAY 'ALLOC DUMPOUT failed RC=' RC; CALL CLEANUP; EXIT 12 END "ALLOC FI(SYSPRINT) DA(*)"
"CALL *(IFASMFDP)" DUMP_RC = RC IF DUMP_RC > 4 THEN DO SAY 'IFASMFDP ended RC=' DUMP_RC; CALL CLEANUP; EXIT 12 END
SEEN. = 0; CPU. = 0; ELP. = 0 STC_LIST = '' RECS = 0; KEPT = 0 EOF = 0
DO WHILE EOF = 0 "EXECIO 500 DISKR DUMPOUT (STEM REC." IO_RC = RC IF IO_RC = 2 THEN EOF = 1 IF IO_RC <> 0 & IO_RC <> 2 THEN DO SAY 'EXECIO DUMPOUT failed RC=' IO_RC; CALL CLEANUP; EXIT 12 END
DO I = 1 TO REC.0 REC = REC.I RECS = RECS + 1 IF LENGTH(REC) < 60 THEN ITERATE IF C2D(SUBSTR(REC,2,1)) <> 30 THEN ITERATE IF C2D(SUBSTR(REC,19,2)) <> 5 THEN ITERATE
RB = P2BASE(C2X(SUBSTR(REC,7,4))) IF RB < 0 THEN ITERATE RECABS = RB * 86400 + C2D(SUBSTR(REC,3,4)) % 100 IF RECABS < CUTOFF THEN ITERATE
IOFF = C2D(SUBSTR(REC,29,4)); ILEN = C2D(SUBSTR(REC,33,2)) ION = C2D(SUBSTR(REC,35,2)) COFF = C2D(SUBSTR(REC,53,4)); CLEN = C2D(SUBSTR(REC,57,2)) CON = C2D(SUBSTR(REC,59,2)) IF ION = 0 | CON = 0 THEN ITERATE IF ILEN < 72 | CLEN < 12 THEN ITERATE IF IOFF < 5 | COFF < 5 THEN ITERATE IF IOFF - 4 + ILEN > LENGTH(REC) THEN ITERATE IF COFF - 4 + CLEN > LENGTH(REC) THEN ITERATE ID = SUBSTR(REC, IOFF - 3, ILEN) CAS = SUBSTR(REC, COFF - 3, CLEN)
JESID = STRIP(SUBSTR(ID,33,8)) IF LEFT(JESID,3) <> 'STC' THEN ITERATE JN = STRIP(SUBSTR(ID,1,8)) IF JN = '' THEN ITERATE
SB = P2BASE(C2X(SUBSTR(ID,69,4))) IF SB < 0 THEN ITERATE STARTABS = SB * 86400 + C2D(SUBSTR(ID,65,4)) % 100 ELPSEC = RECABS - STARTABS IF ELPSEC <= 0 THEN ITERATE
CPUSEC = (C2D(SUBSTR(CAS,5,4)) + C2D(SUBSTR(CAS,9,4))) / 100
IF SEEN.JN = 0 THEN DO SEEN.JN = 1 STC_LIST = STC_LIST JN END CPU.JN = CPU.JN + CPUSEC IF ELPSEC > ELP.JN THEN ELP.JN = ELPSEC KEPT = KEPT + 1 END END "EXECIO 0 DISKR DUMPOUT (FINIS"
SAY 'SMF records read:' RECS ' STC subtype-5 in window:' KEPT SAY ' ' SAY LEFT('JOBNAME',9) RIGHT('CPU(s)',9) RIGHT('ELP(s)',9) , RIGHT('RATIO%',8) LEFT('GRADE',7) SAY COPIES('-',72)
WORST = ''; WORSTVAL = ''; GRADED = 0 DO J = 1 TO WORDS(STC_LIST) JN = WORD(STC_LIST,J) IF ELP.JN < MIN_HRS * 3600 THEN ITERATE RATIO = FORMAT(CPU.JN * 100 / ELP.JN,,2) SELECT WHEN RATIO < RED_THR THEN GRADE = 'RED' WHEN RATIO < AMB_THR THEN GRADE = 'AMBER' OTHERWISE GRADE = 'GREEN' END GRADED = GRADED + 1 IF WORSTVAL = '' THEN WORSTVAL = RATIO IF RATIO < WORSTVAL THEN WORSTVAL = RATIO IF GRADE = 'RED' THEN WORST = 'RED' IF GRADE = 'AMBER' & WORST <> 'RED' THEN WORST = 'AMBER' IF GRADE = 'GREEN' & WORST = '' THEN WORST = 'GREEN' SAY LEFT(JN,9) RIGHT(FORMAT(CPU.JN,,1),9) , RIGHT(FORMAT(ELP.JN,,1),9) RIGHT(RATIO,7)'%' LEFT(GRADE,7) CALL EMIT 'TOP_CONSUMER:CPU:'JN':'RATIO'% ('GRADE')' END
SAY COPIES('=',72) IF GRADED = 0 THEN DO SAY 'No STC met the' MIN_HRS'-hour elapsed minimum in the window.' CALL EMIT 'VERDICT:CPU:0:'RED_THR':UNKNOWN' END ELSE DO SAY 'STCs graded:' GRADED ' Worst grade:' WORST CALL EMIT 'VERDICT:CPU:'WORSTVAL':'RED_THR':'WORST END CALL WRITEOUT 'cpu' SAY 'CPU SHAPE ANALYSIS COMPLETE' CALL CLEANUP EXIT 0
CLEANUP: ADDRESS TSO "FREE FI(DUMPIN DUMPOUT SYSIN SYSPRINT)" RETURN
EMIT: L = ARG(1); SAY L K2 = OUT.0 + 1; OUT.K2 = L; OUT.0 = K2 RETURN
WRITEOUT: FN = WORKDIR'/hc_'ARG(1)'.txt' ADDRESS TSO "ALLOC FI(HCOUT) PATH('"FN"')" , "PATHOPTS(OWRONLY,OCREAT,OTRUNC) PATHMODE(SIRWXU) FILEDATA(TEXT)" IF RC = 0 THEN DO ADDRESS TSO "EXECIO" OUT.0 "DISKW HCOUT (STEM OUT. FINIS" IF RC <> 0 THEN SAY 'WARN: EXECIO to' FN 'RC='RC ADDRESS TSO "FREE FI(HCOUT)" END ELSE SAY 'WARN: could not open' FN 'RC='RC RETURN
BASE2J: PROCEDURE ARG B . S = DATE('S', B, 'B') YR = LEFT(S,4) DDD = B - DATE('B', YR'0101', 'S') + 1 RETURN YR || RIGHT(DDD, 3, '0')
P2BASE: PROCEDURE ARG H . IF LENGTH(H) <> 8 THEN RETURN -1 IF SUBSTR(H,8,1) <> 'F' THEN RETURN -1 IF DATATYPE(SUBSTR(H,1,7),'W') = 0 THEN RETURN -1 C = SUBSTR(H,2,1) YY = SUBSTR(H,3,2) DDD = SUBSTR(H,5,3) IF DDD < 1 | DDD > 366 THEN RETURN -1 YR = 1900 + C * 100 + YY RETURN DATE('B', YR'0101', 'S') + DDD - 1
HANDLE_ERROR: SAY 'REXX NOVALUE at line' SIGL 'variable:' CONDITION('D') EXIT 12

step.name: memoryPaging
step.title: Memory and Paging Health (RMF Summary)
step.description: Runs the RMF Postprocessor (ERBRMFPP) and parses the DEMAND PAGING column of the Summary report. Degrades to UNKNOWN if RMF is unavailable. Writes VERDICT to WORKDIR/hc_memory.txt.
step.instructions: This step runs the RMF Postprocessor over ${instance-SMF_INPUT_DSN} with SUMMARY(INT,TOT) and averages the DEMAND PAGING column, writing the grade to ${instance-WORKDIR}/hc_memory.txt. If ERBRMFPP is unavailable or the report cannot be parsed, the axis is graded UNKNOWN and the step still completes. Look for VERDICT:MEMORY: in the log.

template.inlineTemplate:
/* REXX - Memory/paging health via the RMF Postprocessor Summary. */ /* ERBRMFPP is called from this exec (control cards to a temp SYSIN). */ /* RMF/parse failures degrade to VERDICT ... UNKNOWN. Captured via */ /* EMIT, written to WORKDIR/hc_memory.txt by WRITEOUT. */ SIGNAL ON NOVALUE NAME HANDLE_ERROR
WORKDIR = '${instance-WORKDIR}' SMF_DSN = '${instance-SMF_INPUT_DSN}' WIN_HRS = '${instance-MEASUREMENT_HOURS}' RED_THR = '${instance-PGRATE_RED}' AMB_THR = '${instance-PGRATE_AMBER}' OUT. = ''; OUT.0 = 0
IF DATATYPE(RED_THR,'N') = 0 | DATATYPE(AMB_THR,'N') = 0 THEN DO SAY 'Paging thresholds must be numeric.'; EXIT 12 END IF AMB_THR >= RED_THR THEN DO SAY 'PGRATE_AMBER must be less than PGRATE_RED.'; EXIT 12 END
SAY COPIES('=',72) SAY 'MEMORY / PAGING HEALTH (RMF SUMMARY) -' DATE('S') TIME() SAY 'Dataset:' SMF_DSN ' Window hint:' WIN_HRS 'hours' SAY COPIES('=',72)
PGRATE = ''
ADDRESS TSO "ALLOC FI(SYSIN) NEW DELETE REUSE UNIT(SYSDA) SPACE(1,1) TRACKS" , "RECFM(F B) LRECL(80) BLKSIZE(3120)" IF RC <> 0 THEN DO; SAY 'ALLOC SYSIN failed RC=' RC; EXIT 12; END QUEUE ' SUMMARY(INT,TOT)' "EXECIO" QUEUED() "DISKW SYSIN (FINIS" IF RC <> 0 THEN DO SAY 'Write of ERBRMFPP control cards failed RC=' RC CALL CLEANUP; EXIT 12 END
"ALLOC FI(MFPINPUT) DA('"SMF_DSN"') SHR REUSE" IF RC <> 0 THEN DO SAY 'ALLOC of' SMF_DSN 'failed RC=' RC CALL CLEANUP; EXIT 12 END "ALLOC FI(SYSOUT) NEW DELETE REUSE UNIT(SYSDA) SPACE(15,15) TRACKS" , "RECFM(F B A) LRECL(133) BLKSIZE(13300)" IF RC <> 0 THEN DO SAY 'ALLOC SYSOUT failed RC=' RC; CALL CLEANUP; EXIT 12 END "ALLOC FI(MFPMSGDS) DA(*)"
"CALL *(ERBRMFPP)" PP_RC = RC SAY 'ERBRMFPP ended RC=' PP_RC
IF PP_RC <= 4 THEN DO "EXECIO * DISKR SYSOUT (STEM RPT. FINIS" IF RC = 0 THEN DO COLP = 0; NVAL = 0; SUMV = 0 DO I = 1 TO RPT.0 IF COLP = 0 THEN DO P = POS('PAGING', RPT.I) IF P > 0 THEN COLP = P ITERATE END IF POS('TOTAL', RPT.I) > 0 THEN ITERATE V = STRIP(SUBSTR(RPT.I, MAX(1, COLP - 1), 8)) IF DATATYPE(V,'N') THEN DO NVAL = NVAL + 1 SUMV = SUMV + V END END IF NVAL > 0 THEN PGRATE = FORMAT(SUMV / NVAL,,2) ELSE SAY 'No numeric DEMAND PAGING values found.' END ELSE SAY 'EXECIO of the report failed RC=' RC END ELSE SAY 'RMF may not be installed/active on this system.'
IF PGRATE = '' THEN DO SAY 'Paging rate could not be determined.' CALL EMIT 'VERDICT:MEMORY:0:'AMB_THR':UNKNOWN' END ELSE DO SELECT WHEN PGRATE >= RED_THR THEN GRADE = 'RED' WHEN PGRATE >= AMB_THR THEN GRADE = 'AMBER' OTHERWISE GRADE = 'GREEN' END SAY 'Average demand paging rate:' PGRATE '/sec Grade:' GRADE CALL EMIT 'VERDICT:MEMORY:'PGRATE':'AMB_THR':'GRADE END CALL WRITEOUT 'memory' SAY 'MEMORY PAGING HEALTH COMPLETE' CALL CLEANUP EXIT 0
CLEANUP: ADDRESS TSO "FREE FI(MFPINPUT SYSOUT SYSIN MFPMSGDS)" RETURN
EMIT: L = ARG(1); SAY L K2 = OUT.0 + 1; OUT.K2 = L; OUT.0 = K2 RETURN
WRITEOUT: FN = WORKDIR'/hc_'ARG(1)'.txt' ADDRESS TSO "ALLOC FI(HCOUT) PATH('"FN"')" , "PATHOPTS(OWRONLY,OCREAT,OTRUNC) PATHMODE(SIRWXU) FILEDATA(TEXT)" IF RC = 0 THEN DO ADDRESS TSO "EXECIO" OUT.0 "DISKW HCOUT (STEM OUT. FINIS" IF RC <> 0 THEN SAY 'WARN: EXECIO to' FN 'RC='RC ADDRESS TSO "FREE FI(HCOUT)" END ELSE SAY 'WARN: could not open' FN 'RC='RC RETURN
HANDLE_ERROR: SAY 'REXX NOVALUE at line' SIGL 'variable:' CONDITION('D') EXIT 12

step.name: datasetHotspots
step.title: Dataset I/O Hotspot Scan (SMF-14/15)
step.description: Dumps SMF type-14/15 records with IFASMFDP (called from REXX), ranks datasets by open frequency in the window (JFCB dataset name at record offset 68, RDW-inclusive), and writes VERDICT/TOP_CONSUMER lines to WORKDIR/hc_dataset.txt.
step.instructions: This step counts dataset opens over the last ${instance-MEASUREMENT_HOURS} hours from SMF type-14/15 records in ${instance-SMF_INPUT_DSN}, lists the ${instance-TOP_N} busiest datasets, and writes the result to ${instance-WORKDIR}/hc_dataset.txt. AMBER above 500 opens/hr, RED above 2000. Look for VERDICT:DATASET_IO: in the log.

template.inlineTemplate:
/* REXX - Dataset I/O hotspots from SMF type-14/15 records. */ /* IFASMFDP called from this exec. Dataset name = JFCBDSNM at 65,44 */ /* (RDW stripped). Captured via EMIT, written to WORKDIR/hc_dataset. */ SIGNAL ON NOVALUE NAME HANDLE_ERROR
WORKDIR = '${instance-WORKDIR}' SMF_DSN = '${instance-SMF_INPUT_DSN}' WIN_HRS = '${instance-MEASUREMENT_HOURS}' TOPN = '${instance-TOP_N}' OUT. = ''; OUT.0 = 0
IF DATATYPE(WIN_HRS,'W') = 0 THEN DO SAY 'MEASUREMENT_HOURS must be a whole number:' WIN_HRS; EXIT 12 END IF WIN_HRS < 1 THEN DO SAY 'MEASUREMENT_HOURS must be at least 1:' WIN_HRS; EXIT 12 END IF DATATYPE(TOPN,'W') = 0 THEN DO SAY 'TOP_N must be a whole number:' TOPN; EXIT 12 END IF TOPN < 1 THEN DO SAY 'TOP_N must be a positive integer:' TOPN; EXIT 12 END
SAY COPIES('=',72) SAY 'DATASET I/O HOTSPOTS (SMF-14/15) -' DATE('S') TIME() SAY 'Dataset:' SMF_DSN ' Window:' WIN_HRS 'hours Top N:' TOPN SAY COPIES('=',72)
NOWABS = DATE('B') * 86400 + TIME('S') CUTOFF = NOWABS - WIN_HRS * 3600 STARTJ = BASE2J(DATE('B') - (WIN_HRS % 24 + 1)) ENDJ = BASE2J(DATE('B'))
ADDRESS TSO "ALLOC FI(SYSIN) NEW DELETE REUSE UNIT(SYSDA) SPACE(1,1) TRACKS" , "RECFM(F B) LRECL(80) BLKSIZE(3120)" IF RC <> 0 THEN DO; SAY 'ALLOC SYSIN failed RC=' RC; EXIT 12; END QUEUE ' INDD(DUMPIN,OPTIONS(DUMP))' QUEUE ' OUTDD(DUMPOUT,TYPE(14,15))' QUEUE ' DATE('STARTJ','ENDJ')' "EXECIO" QUEUED() "DISKW SYSIN (FINIS" IF RC <> 0 THEN DO SAY 'Write of IFASMFDP control cards failed RC=' RC CALL CLEANUP; EXIT 12 END
"ALLOC FI(DUMPIN) DA('"SMF_DSN"') SHR REUSE" IF RC <> 0 THEN DO SAY 'ALLOC of' SMF_DSN 'failed RC=' RC CALL CLEANUP; EXIT 12 END "ALLOC FI(DUMPOUT) NEW DELETE REUSE UNIT(SYSDA)" , "SPACE(50,50) CYLINDERS" , "RECFM(V B S) LRECL(32760) BLKSIZE(27998)" IF RC <> 0 THEN DO SAY 'ALLOC DUMPOUT failed RC=' RC; CALL CLEANUP; EXIT 12 END "ALLOC FI(SYSPRINT) DA(*)"
"CALL *(IFASMFDP)" DUMP_RC = RC IF DUMP_RC > 4 THEN DO SAY 'IFASMFDP ended RC=' DUMP_RC; CALL CLEANUP; EXIT 12 END
OK = 'ABCDEFGHIJKLMNOPQRSTUVWXYZ0123456789$#@.-' OPENS. = 0 DSNLIST = '' TOTAL = 0 EOF = 0
DO WHILE EOF = 0 "EXECIO 500 DISKR DUMPOUT (STEM REC." IO_RC = RC IF IO_RC = 2 THEN EOF = 1 IF IO_RC <> 0 & IO_RC <> 2 THEN DO SAY 'EXECIO DUMPOUT failed RC=' IO_RC; CALL CLEANUP; EXIT 12 END
DO I = 1 TO REC.0 REC = REC.I IF LENGTH(REC) < 108 THEN ITERATE T = C2D(SUBSTR(REC,2,1)) IF T <> 14 & T <> 15 THEN ITERATE
RB = P2BASE(C2X(SUBSTR(REC,7,4))) IF RB < 0 THEN ITERATE RECABS = RB * 86400 + C2D(SUBSTR(REC,3,4)) % 100 IF RECABS < CUTOFF THEN ITERATE
DSN = STRIP(SUBSTR(REC,65,44)) IF DSN = '' THEN ITERATE IF LEFT(DSN,1) = '&' THEN ITERATE IF POS('NULLFILE',DSN) > 0 THEN ITERATE IF VERIFY(DSN, OK) <> 0 THEN ITERATE
IF OPENS.DSN = 0 THEN DSNLIST = DSNLIST DSN OPENS.DSN = OPENS.DSN + 1 TOTAL = TOTAL + 1 END END "EXECIO 0 DISKR DUMPOUT (FINIS"
SAY 'SMF-14/15 records in window:' TOTAL SAY 'Distinct datasets seen:' WORDS(DSNLIST) SAY ' ' SAY 'TOP' TOPN 'DATASETS BY OPEN COUNT' SAY COPIES('-',72) SAY LEFT('DATASET',44) RIGHT('OPENS',8) RIGHT('OPENS/HR',10) SAY COPIES('-',72)
WORST_RATE = 0 DONE. = 0
DO K = 1 TO TOPN BEST = -1; BESTD = '' DO J = 1 TO WORDS(DSNLIST) D = WORD(DSNLIST,J) IF DONE.D = 1 THEN ITERATE IF OPENS.D > BEST THEN DO; BEST = OPENS.D; BESTD = D; END END IF BESTD = '' | OPENS.BESTD = 0 THEN LEAVE DONE.BESTD = 1 RATE = FORMAT(OPENS.BESTD / WIN_HRS,,0) IF RATE > WORST_RATE THEN WORST_RATE = RATE SAY LEFT(BESTD,44) RIGHT(OPENS.BESTD,8) RIGHT(RATE,9)'/hr' CALL EMIT 'TOP_CONSUMER:DATASET:'BESTD':'OPENS.BESTD 'opens,' RATE'/hr' END
SELECT WHEN WORST_RATE >= 2000 THEN GRADE = 'RED' WHEN WORST_RATE >= 500 THEN GRADE = 'AMBER' OTHERWISE GRADE = 'GREEN' END
SAY COPIES('=',72) SAY 'Highest open rate:' WORST_RATE 'opens/hr Grade:' GRADE CALL EMIT 'VERDICT:DATASET_IO:'WORST_RATE':500:'GRADE CALL WRITEOUT 'dataset' SAY 'DATASET HOTSPOT SCAN COMPLETE' CALL CLEANUP EXIT 0
CLEANUP: ADDRESS TSO "FREE FI(DUMPIN DUMPOUT SYSIN SYSPRINT)" RETURN
EMIT: L = ARG(1); SAY L K2 = OUT.0 + 1; OUT.K2 = L; OUT.0 = K2 RETURN
WRITEOUT: FN = WORKDIR'/hc_'ARG(1)'.txt' ADDRESS TSO "ALLOC FI(HCOUT) PATH('"FN"')" , "PATHOPTS(OWRONLY,OCREAT,OTRUNC) PATHMODE(SIRWXU) FILEDATA(TEXT)" IF RC = 0 THEN DO ADDRESS TSO "EXECIO" OUT.0 "DISKW HCOUT (STEM OUT. FINIS" IF RC <> 0 THEN SAY 'WARN: EXECIO to' FN 'RC='RC ADDRESS TSO "FREE FI(HCOUT)" END ELSE SAY 'WARN: could not open' FN 'RC='RC RETURN
BASE2J: PROCEDURE ARG B . S = DATE('S', B, 'B') YR = LEFT(S,4) DDD = B - DATE('B', YR'0101', 'S') + 1 RETURN YR || RIGHT(DDD, 3, '0')
P2BASE: PROCEDURE ARG H . IF LENGTH(H) <> 8 THEN RETURN -1 IF SUBSTR(H,8,1) <> 'F' THEN RETURN -1 IF DATATYPE(SUBSTR(H,1,7),'W') = 0 THEN RETURN -1 C = SUBSTR(H,2,1) YY = SUBSTR(H,3,2) DDD = SUBSTR(H,5,3) IF DDD < 1 | DDD > 366 THEN RETURN -1 YR = 1900 + C * 100 + YY RETURN DATE('B', YR'0101', 'S') + DDD - 1
HANDLE_ERROR: SAY 'REXX NOVALUE at line' SIGL 'variable:' CONDITION('D') EXIT 12

step.name: renderReport
step.title: Render HTML Health Report
step.description: Concatenates the collectors' hc_*.txt files, converts them from EBCDIC to UTF-8, and runs generate_report.py (IBM Open Enterprise Python) to write zos_health_report.html directly into the USS work directory. This step is what makes the report appear automatically when the workflow finishes.
step.instructions:
This final step renders the HTML scorecard on the host, so the report exists the moment the workflow completes - no workstation collection needed.
It concatenates ${instance-WORKDIR}/hc_*.txt (written by the four collector steps), converts EBCDIC to UTF-8 with iconv, and runs python3 generate_report.py to produce ${instance-WORKDIR}/zos_health_report.html.
Prerequisite: generate_report.py must already be in ${instance-WORKDIR}, and python3 (IBM Open Enterprise SDK for Python) must be on PATH. The step fails (nonzero RC) if the report cannot be produced.
Download the result with: zowe zos-files download uss-file "${instance-WORKDIR}/zos_health_report.html" -f report.html

template.inlineTemplate:
#!/bin/sh WORKDIR="${instance-WORKDIR}" PYTHON="${instance-PYTHON3}" PY="$WORKDIR/generate_report.py" SRC="$WORKDIR/verdicts_ebcdic.txt" TXT="$WORKDIR/verdicts.txt" HTML="$WORKDIR/zos_health_report.html"
echo "Rendering z/OS Health Check report from $WORKDIR"
if [ ! -x "$PYTHON" ]; then echo "ERROR: python3 not found/executable at $PYTHON" echo "Set the PYTHON3 workflow variable to your IBM Python path." exit 8 fi if [ ! -f "$PY" ]; then echo "ERROR: generate_report.py not found in $WORKDIR" echo "Upload it once: zowe zos-files upload file-to-uss scripts/generate_report.py $PY" exit 8 fi
# Collectors write EBCDIC (IBM-1047) text files. Concatenate, convert to # UTF-8, and TAG the result to match its bytes - otherwise IBM Python # honors an inherited IBM-1047 tag and EBCDIC-decodes the ASCII bytes. cat "$WORKDIR"/hc_*.txt > "$SRC" 2>/dev/null if [ ! -s "$SRC" ]; then echo "ERROR: no collector output (hc_*.txt) found in $WORKDIR" exit 8 fi
iconv -f IBM-1047 -t UTF-8 "$SRC" > "$TXT" 2>/dev/null || cp "$SRC" "$TXT" chtag -t -c ISO8859-1 "$TXT"
echo "VERDICT lines collected:" grep VERDICT: "$TXT" || echo " (none - check the collector steps)"
"$PYTHON" "$PY" --input "$TXT" --output "$HTML" RC=$? if [ $RC -ne 0 ]; then echo "ERROR: generate_report.py failed RC=$RC" exit $RC fi chtag -t -c ISO8859-1 "$HTML"
echo "Report written to $HTML" echo "HEALTH SCORECARD COMPLETE"
